description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a boxy, angular design and a visibly worn, distressed brown leather or faux leather upholstery. The surface shows patches of discoloration and scuffing, suggesting heavy use or intentional vintage styling. The seat and backrest are divided into three uniform sections, with the cushions appearing to be attached and integrated into the frame. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend at the same height as the backrest, providing a solid, block-like profile. The legs are short and mostly recessed, making them barely visible and giving the sofa a grounded, sturdy appearance. The overall look is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, parks, or garages.
description: A distressed brown leather sofa with three attached seat and back sections, straight block armrests, and a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The upholstery is visibly worn, and the legs are short and mostly hidden.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest, with visible wear on the upholstery.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three uniform seat and back sections, the full width of the sofa, and the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and the sofa's boxy profile.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the continuous backrest and the recessed, barely visible legs, as well as the sofa's overall length.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat and back cushions arranged in a single row, integrated into the frame with no visible separation or loose elements.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests at the same height as the backrest, thick and fully padded, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, recessed legs that are barely visible, likely block or stub style, positioned at the corners and possibly with central support, with no distinctive finish or texture.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest divided into three uniform sections, with attached cushions and no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Distressed, solid brown upholstery with visible patches of wear and discoloration, giving a rugged, vintage appearance; no visible stitching or decorative pattern.
